content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
RISK-ON: low volatility (Vol: 21.9%) with mixed breadth (4/8 sectors positive); market tone constructive but selective.

2. Which sectors are leading?
Banking and Energy are leading; Banking picks include AKBNK (1W: +4.92% | 1M: -3.48%) RECOVERY and GARAN (1W: +4.53% | 1M: -2.41%) RECOVERY, Energy leaders include PETKM (1W: +3.30% | 1M: +19.13%) ABOVE TREND and SASA (1W: +3.85% | 1M: +9.46%) ABOVE TREND.

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Technology & Telecom and Retail are lagging; KONTR (1W: -9.74% | 1M: -8.47%) BELOW TREND and CCOLA (1W: -4.90% | 1M: -4.83%) BELOW TREND lead the weakness.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
KRDMD (1W: +8.22% | 1M: +13.43%) ABOVE TREND, ASELS (1W: +6.79% | 1M: +2.55%) ABOVE TREND, AKBNK (1W: +4.92% | 1M: -3.48%) RECOVERY, GARAN (1W: +4.53% | 1M: -2.41%) RECOVERY, SOKM (1W: +4.25% | 1M: -14.64%) RECOVERY.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
KONTR (1W: -9.74% | 1M: -8.47%) BELOW TREND, TOASO (1W: -7.95% | 1M: -7.12%) BELOW TREND, FROTO (1W: -4.35% | 1M: -7.82%) BELOW TREND, CCOLA (1W: -4.90% | 1M: -4.83%) BELOW TREND, TKFEN (1W: -2.96% | 1M: +28.95%) CORRECTION.

6. Momentum Stocks?
Upside momentum: KRDMD (1W: +8.22% | 1M: +13.43%) ABOVE TREND, ASELS (1W: +6.79% | 1M: +2.55%) ABOVE TREND, AKBNK (1W: +4.92% | 1M: -3.48%) RECOVERY; downside momentum: KONTR (1W: -9.74% | 1M: -8.47%) BELOW TREND, TOASO (1W: -7.95% | 1M: -7.12%) BELOW TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Banks showing short-term recovery after oversold moves; AKBNK (1W: +4.92% | 1M: -3.48%) RECOVERY, GARAN (1W: +4.53% | 1M: -2.41%) RECOVERY, ISCTR (1W: +3.72% | 1M: -3.94%) RECOVERY, YKBNK (1W: +4.00% | 1M: -2.88%) RECOVERY — tactical overweight on positive momentum.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Mixed industrial tape: KRDMD (1W: +8.22% | 1M: +13.43%) ABOVE TREND and ASELS (1W: +6.79% | 1M: +2.55%) ABOVE TREND outperform while TOASO (1W: -7.95% | 1M: -7.12%) BELOW TREND and FROTO (1W: -4.35% | 1M: -7.82%) BELOW TREND lag — favor selected names with confirmed 1W/1M strength.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Energy showing constructive leadership: PETKM (1W: +3.30% | 1M: +19.13%) ABOVE TREND, SASA (1W: +3.85% | 1M: +9.46%) ABOVE TREND, TUPRS (1W: +0.68% | 1M: +4.91%) ABOVE TREND; monitor commodity-sensitive flows and margin headlines.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Risk-on tactical tilt: overweight heavy industry and energy names with ABOVE TREND confirmation, maintain selective bank exposure for mean-reversion (RECOVERY), trim Technology & Telecom and weak retail positions.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
KRDMD (1W: +8.22% | 1M: +13.43%) ABOVE TREND, ASELS (1W: +6.79% | 1M: +2.55%) ABOVE TREND, PETKM (1W: +3.30% | 1M: +19.13%) ABOVE TREND, AKBNK (1W: +4.92% | 1M: -3.48%) RECOVERY — catalysts: earnings flow, FX-sensitive data, commodity moves.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Heavy Industry and Energy for upside leadership, Banking for rotation and liquidity-driven bounces.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Watch XU100 reaction to 20-day momentum (short-term support) and recent swing highs for continuation; catalysts: CBRT commentary, April inflation prints, major corporates’ results and oil/commodity moves.

## EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

RISK-ON regime with low volatility and mixed breadth; market is selective—heavy industry and energy lead while tech and parts of retail lag. Trade tactically: overweight confirmed ABOVE TREND cyclicals, keep banks as tactical recovery plays and avoid structurally weak tech/telecom names.
